raw_consumer_statement:
I went to XXXX XXXX XXXX  located at XXXX XXXX XXXX, XXXX XXXX, LA XXXX ( phone : ( XXXX ) XXXX ) on XX/XX/XXXXXX/XX/XXXX with an initial pretip charge of {$45.00} on my CITI bank credit card. The final charge from the merchant on my card was {$500.00}, which is greater than any reasonable tip. 

I tried contacting the merchant, XXXX XXXX XXXX, via phone call, email, XXXX, and XXXX for resolution or a copy of the receipt for the purchase. I did not receive a response from them through any form of communication. 

Following that I disputed the charge with CITI bank online and through certified mail. The company decided that I was responsible for the charge since I can not get a receipt despite my communication about the noncooperation of the original merchant to provide a receipt. The bank did not contact the merchant themselves for more information.
